details.test: Task 1: Pay smallest unpaid Main Office electricity invoice with Visa 4242
Task 2: Switch Downtown Store electricity to cheapest 12+ month fixed-rate plan
Task 3: Create Warehouse gas high-usage alert (>250 units/day) via email and SMS
Task 4: Add new East Branch location and link an existing electricity account
Task 5: Export CSV report of Downtown Store gas usage Jan 1–Jun 30, 2025
Task 6: Update company-wide billing contact and apply to all accounts
Task 7: Create autopay rule for electricity invoices <= $200, 3 days before due, using bank 9876
Task 8: Add review note for highest Q2 2025 electricity cost location
Task 9: Disable paper billing for all gas accounts, leave electricity accounts unchanged
